checks.name: durable_publish_ack
checks.requirement: publish success must represent replicated commit acknowledgement rather than leader-local enqueue
checks.failure_mode: ambiguous client timeout or leader crash can leave operators unable to classify whether an event committed
blockers: current backend memory does not yet match the replicated target broker_replicated
broker bootstrap configuration is not ready: broker event log config missing driver, urls, topic

checks.name: replay_checkpoint_alignment
checks.requirement: replay cursors and subscriber checkpoints must resolve to the same durable sequence domain across failover
checks.failure_mode: consumer recovery can skip or duplicate committed events after broker election or reconnect
blockers: current backend memory does not yet match the replicated target broker_replicated
broker bootstrap configuration is not ready: broker event log config missing driver, urls, topic

checks.name: retention_boundary_visibility
checks.requirement: the backend must expose oldest/newest retained replay boundaries before rollout claims resumable recovery
checks.failure_mode: aged-out checkpoints can silently start from an unsafe later point instead of surfacing truncation
blockers: current backend memory does not yet match the replicated target broker_replicated
broker bootstrap configuration is not ready: broker event log config missing driver, urls, topic

checks.name: live_fanout_isolation
checks.requirement: SSE and in-process live subscribers must stay decoupled from broker catch-up lag and replay backfill
checks.failure_mode: replay recovery or broker lag can stall live delivery and blur the source of operator-visible latency
blockers: current backend memory does not yet match the replicated target broker_replicated
broker bootstrap configuration is not ready: broker event log config missing driver, urls, topic
current backend memory does not yet match the replicated target broker_replicated
broker bootstrap configuration is not ready: broker event log config missing driver, urls, topic
next_actions: switch BIGCLAW_EVENT_LOG_BACKEND to broker_replicated after the replicated adapter is wired into runtime paths
set BIGCLAW_EVENT_LOG_BROKER_DRIVER, BIGCLAW_EVENT_LOG_BROKER_URLS, and BIGCLAW_EVENT_LOG_BROKER_TOPIC so broker bootstrap becomes ready
